ControllerEndpoint.description: How the platform reaches a greenhouse's controller — registry metadata supplied at registration (platform data model §1). The SPA never speaks these directly; only the platform does.

rest_base_url.description: Base URL of the controller's REST API on the local Docker network (e.g. http://gh-a:8080).

mqtt_topic_root.description: Root of the controller's MQTT topic tree (e.g. gh/gh-a).

bearer_token.description: Optional per-controller pre-shared bearer token (RFC-011 service-auth hardening, dormant by default). Present only when the controller is hardened to require a token on its REST write endpoints; the platform then presents it on every downward write. Omitted/null when the controller is unauthenticated (the single-host default).

GreenhouseSummary.description: One greenhouse's identity and live rollup for the fleet view (frontend purpose-and-views §1). A compact live-climate readout backs the fleet card; the target bundle is on the detail endpoint, not here.

crop.description: Assigned crop label, or null when none is assigned (a label only — the controller is crop-agnostic).

drift.description: (2b) True when the controller's reported setpoints differ from the platform's intended state (reconciliation, platform §5).

time_scale.description: Simulation-only: the controller's current simulated-clock speed multiplier (1.0 = real-time), backing the fleet card's per-greenhouse speed indicator. Null on a real-hardware controller or when unknown. Patched live by the WebSocket status frame (platform-dashboard-live-ws). Each controller's clock is independent (controller HAL §7).

climate.description: Compact live-climate readout for the fleet card.

temperature.description: Latest air-temperature reading (°C), or null when unavailable.

humidity.description: Latest relative-humidity reading (%RH), or null when unavailable.

co2.description: Latest CO₂ reading (ppm), or null when unavailable.

dli.description: Latest accumulated Daily Light Integral (mol·m⁻²·d⁻¹) for the current crop day, or null when unavailable. A derived value; the underlying instantaneous PAR remains available as a sensor metric on the telemetry endpoints.

GreenhouseDetail.description: A single greenhouse's snapshot for the detail view: its summary fields, the full current target bundle, and the live per-zone irrigation status (frontend data model §6, key ["greenhouse", id]).

zone_status.description: Live per-zone irrigation status, one entry per configured zone, keyed to a Setpoints.zones target by zone_id. The read-only counterpart to the mutable per-zone targets.

GreenhouseRegistration.description: Operator registration of a greenhouse into the fleet (platform §3 — registration is operator tooling, served in 2a). The id is the operator-chosen slug reused everywhere.
